segments.text: For a while here, he finds an opportunity, but it all depends on whether the opportunity rises or not.
It's a big if right now, at 77% on this last stock.
As you mentioned though, that's the win condition, and that's the lose condition getting clipped.

full_text: For a while here, he finds an opportunity, but it all depends on whether the opportunity rises or not. It's a big if right now, at 77% on this last stock. As you mentioned though, that's the win condition, and that's the lose condition getting clipped.
